backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a Chinese family genealogy system, implementing manuscript management, person/relationship CRUD, user profiles, clan interactions (posts/replies), family activities, contact info, and donation channels, with access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the '确认' button text color change to black was implemented in DeletePasscodeModal.tsx and UploadPasscodeModal.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose, styling approach, and notable implementation details for the genealogy application.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, primary, secondary, destructive, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled '邓氏家族族谱系统', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that gates access via a passcode screen, manages a five-section navigation state (manuscripts, history, people, interaction, contact), and renders the corresponding section component inside the Layout shell.
frontend/src/components/AncientManuscrip: Component for uploading and deleting ancient manuscript files, featuring file selection with image preview, upload progress tracking, and passcode-gated upload/delete actions via modal dialogs.
Clan message board component rendering posts with expandable reply threads, passcode-gated post/reply creation via UploadPasscodeModal, and passcode-gated deletion via DeletePasscodeModal, styled with a traditional Chinese theme.
frontend/src/components/ContactClan.tsx: Main component for the clan contact section, managing clan contacts, help requests, and donation channels with full CRUD operations and passcode-protected mutations.
frontend/src/components/DeletePasscodeMo: Modal dialog that requires a hardcoded delete passcode to confirm destructive delete operations, with show/hide password toggle and error feedback.
frontend/src/components/FamilyActivities: Component for listing and managing family activities with image gallery support, including upload and delete flows gated by passcode modals.
frontend/src/components/FamilyHistory.ts: Component for displaying and editing the family history text, with passcode-protected save and inline textarea editing.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component rendering the hero banner, top navigation bar with section switching, main content area, and footer.
frontend/src/components/PasscodeGate.tsx: Full-screen passcode entry gate that blocks access to the app until the correct access passcode is entered, with shake animation on failure.
Main directory component that lists all people with search, and manages navigation between list, profile, add, and edit views. Includes a passcode-protected delete flow via DeletePasscodeModal.
frontend/src/components/PersonForm.tsx: Form component for creating or editing a person's record, including photo upload and all biographical fields. Requires passcode confirmation via UploadPasscodeModal before saving.
frontend/src/components/PersonProfile.ts: Detailed profile view for a single person showing bio, media gallery, and relationships tabs. Supports adding/deleting media and relationships, and deleting the person, all with passcode modals.
frontend/src/components/UploadPasscodeMo: Modal dialog that prompts the user for a hardcoded upload passcode before confirming an upload or save action. Shows an error message on incorrect entry.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing access control with an admin token from URL params. Invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity login, logout, and identity state using AuthClient. Exposes login status flags and the current identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including manuscripts, family history, people, relationships, posts, activities, clan contacts, help requests, and donation channels.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports Chinese fonts, and defines a traditional Chinese manuscript-themed design system with oklch color tokens for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Chinese serif/sans fonts, oklch-based color tokens (seal, gold, parchment, ink, sidebar), custom shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current fix request: changing the text color of all '确认' (Confirm) buttons to black throughout the application.
